content.purpose: Test coherence-weighted similarity as readout. Candidate 2.
content.method: Weight each codebook vector vote by the coherence of its neighborhood (how many nearest neighbors share its class label).
content.result: KILLED. Coherence readout 85.3% vs 1-NN 86.9%. 0/27 wins across all conditions. Coherence is a static vector property that penalizes boundary vectors (the informative ones).
content.key_insight: Static vector properties (coherence, density) penalize the most informative boundary prototypes. Readout must be input-conditional.
